The Chronicles of Riddick (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $57,712,751Details
International Box Office $49,500,000
Worldwide Box Office $107,212,751
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,289,165 (42.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$120,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,757 opening theaters/2,759 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $111,150,487

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 11th, 2004 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: July 29th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: November 16th, 2004 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violent action and some language
Running Time: 119 minutes
Franchise: Riddick
Plot point: Bounty Hunter, Bounty/Price on one's Head, Rescue
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
